CheckTitle: Conditional Access policy enforces compliant device, hybrid join, or MFA for all users
Description: A Conditional Access policy enforces that all users must authenticate with a **compliant device**, **Microsoft Entra hybrid joined device**, or **multifactor authentication** as alternative grant controls, covering browser and mobile/desktop client app types across all cloud applications.
Risk: Without a policy requiring compliant devices or MFA, attackers who compromise credentials can access corporate resources from **unmanaged or untrusted devices**. This increases exposure to **unauthorized access**, **data exfiltration**, and **lateral movement** from endpoints lacking security controls.

Code.Other:
1. Navigate to the Microsoft Entra admin center https://entra.microsoft.com.
2. Expand **Protection** > **Conditional Access** and select **Policies**.
3. Select **New policy**.
4. Under **Users**, select **All users**.
5. Under **Target resources**, select **All cloud apps**.
6. Under **Conditions** > **Client apps**, select **Browser** and **Mobile apps and desktop clients**.
7. Under **Grant**, select **Grant access**, then check **Require multifactor authentication**, **Require device to be marked as compliant**, and **Require Microsoft Entra hybrid joined device**.
8. Choose **Require one of the selected controls**.
9. Set the policy to **Report-only** first, then enable after validation.
10. Click **Create**.

Recommendation.Text: Enforce a **Conditional Access** policy that requires a **compliant device**, **hybrid joined device**, or **MFA** as alternative grant controls for all users. This ensures access is only granted from trusted endpoints or with strong authentication, following a **zero trust** approach.
